productDisplayName: Baggit Women Chika Mayur Green Mobile Pouch
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish mobile pouch from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or convert it to a sling bag with the detachable shoulder strap. Dimensions: 17 cm x 11 cm Created from crushed velvet and synthetic overlays Front pocket with a flap and magnetic button closure A flap with a magnetic closure on the flap of the pocket, opens to the main compartments Two main compartments with a zippered pocket in between A zippered pocket at the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
